sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35275" key="e)ndo/puos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνδόπυος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n35275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having an internal abscess</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162</biblScope> </bibl> (misprinted <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πυρος</foreign> by Cramer).</sense> </entryFree>
